auth.label: ASIN Data API Key
auth.description: ASIN Data API key sent as the api_key query parameter. Find or manage it in the ASIN Data API dashboard: https://app.asindataapi.com/.

actions.name: clear_collection_requests
actions.description: Delete multiple requests from a collection by their request IDs in ASIN Data API.

items.description: Unique identifier of a collection request.

request_ids.description: Array of request ID strings to delete. Use list_collection_requests to get valid request IDs for a collection.

collection_id.description: Unique identifier of the collection to clear requests from. Use ASIN Data API collection listings to get valid collection IDs.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting multiple collection requests.

data.description: The ASIN Data API response payload returned by the action.

error.description: Error if any occurred during the action execution.

successful.description: Whether the action execution was successful.

outputSchema.description: The ASIN Data API action result.

actions.name: delete_destination
actions.description: Delete a destination from the ASIN Data API account.

destination_id.description: The unique identifier of the destination to delete. Can be obtained from the list_destinations action.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting an ASIN Data API destination.

data.description: The ASIN Data API response payload returned by the action.

error.description: Error if any occurred during the action execution.

successful.description: Whether the action execution was successful.

outputSchema.description: The ASIN Data API action result.

actions.name: get_collection
actions.description: Get details of a specific ASIN Data API collection including status and request counts.

collection_id.description: Unique identifier of the collection to retrieve. Can be obtained from ASIN Data API collection listings.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for getting an ASIN Data API collection.

data.description: The ASIN Data API response payload returned by the action.

error.description: Error if any occurred during the action execution.

successful.description: Whether the action execution was successful.

outputSchema.description: The ASIN Data API action result.

actions.name: list_collection_requests
actions.description: List requests in an ASIN Data API collection by page.

page.description: Page number for pagination, starting at 1. Each page returns up to 1000 requests.

collection_id.description: Unique identifier of the collection whose requests are to be listed. Can be obtained from ASIN Data API collection listings.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing ASIN Data API collection requests.

data.description: The ASIN Data API response payload returned by the action.

error.description: Error if any occurred during the action execution.

successful.description: Whether the action execution was successful.

outputSchema.description: The ASIN Data API action result.

actions.name: list_destinations
actions.description: List destinations configured on the ASIN Data API account with optional filtering and sorting.

page.description: Page number for pagination, starting at 1.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing ASIN Data API destinations.

data.description: The ASIN Data API response payload returned by the action.

error.description: Error if any occurred during the action execution.

successful.description: Whether the action execution was successful.

outputSchema.description: The ASIN Data API action result.

actions.name: update_destination
actions.description: Update an existing ASIN Data API destination configuration. Only include fields you want to update.

destination_id.description: The unique identifier of the destination.

enabled.description: Whether the destination should be enabled or disabled.

gcs_access_key.description: Google Cloud Storage access key for GCS authentication.

gcs_secret_key.description: Google Cloud Storage secret key for GCS authentication.

oss_access_key.description: Alibaba Cloud OSS access key for OSS authentication.

oss_secret_key.description: Alibaba Cloud OSS secret key for OSS authentication.

s3_bucket_name.description: AWS S3 bucket name for S3-type destinations.

s3_path_prefix.description: Path prefix within the S3 bucket where files will be stored.

gcs_bucket_name.description: Google Cloud Storage bucket name for GCS destinations.

gcs_path_prefix.description: Path prefix within the GCS bucket.

oss_bucket_name.description: Alibaba Cloud OSS bucket name for OSS destinations.

oss_path_prefix.description: Path prefix within the OSS bucket.

s3_access_key_id.description: AWS access key ID for S3 authentication.

azure_account_key.description: Azure storage account key for Azure authentication.

azure_path_prefix.description: Path prefix within the Azure container.

azure_account_name.description: Azure storage account name for Azure destinations.

azure_container_name.description: Azure container name where files will be stored.

s3_secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key for S3 authentication.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for updating an ASIN Data API destination.

data.description: The ASIN Data API response payload returned by the action.

error.description: Error if any occurred during the action execution.

successful.description: Whether the action execution was successful.

outputSchema.description: The ASIN Data API action result.
